utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final plan. Now check each for full specification with required details: (1) health_coverage: explicitly includes physical and mental health insurance with providers, monthly costs, features, and a total monthly cost; this satisfies 'physical and mental health insurance with costs.' (2) property_coverage: includes home/contents insurance provider, monthly cost, and features; satisfies 'home/contents insurance with costs.' (3) travel_coverage: includes provider, monthly cost, and features; satisfies 'travel insurance with costs.' (4) additional_services: includes listed services and explicit additional monthly cost; satisfies 'any enhancement services with costs.' (5) total_budget: provides complete monthly and annual cost breakdown and comparative savings; satisfies 'complete monthly/annual cost breakdown.' Therefore, all 5 are fully specified.
